chosen.theme: Moscow Exchange Altcoin Index Expansion — MOEX Benchmark Suite Addition Signals Emerging Market Institutional Crypto Recognition Beyond BTC/ETH
chosen.news_one_liner: MOEX adding SOL, TRX, BNB, XRP to its benchmark suite creates structured institutional demand in Russia, broadening altcoin adoption beyond Western markets.

candidates.theme: Crypto Altcoin Infrastructure Maturation — Chainlink Secures $100B TVS While XRP Tests Key $1.45 Resistance Amid Regulatory Tailwind
candidates.news_one_liner: JPMorgan's first cross-border tokenized Treasury on the XRP Ledger is the strongest institutional validation in XRP's history, though the price at $1.42 suggests a re-rating lag that a $1.45 breakout
